title: NEW requirement routes to PM
description: A project with one NEW requirement and no blocking artifacts should route to PM.

title: Open PM clarification blocks tasking
description: An open PM clarification should route to Product Director before PM or Engineer continues.

title: Routed Experience Designer finding routes to PM
description: A routed in-scope experience finding should route to PM when there is no newer blocking artifact.

title: Requirement deletion cleans linked state
description: Deleting an unfinished requirement should remove linked single-requirement tasks, linked PM clarifications, and linked implementation artifacts.

title: Implementation lock is scoped per project
description: One active implementation run should block the same project, but a different project may still start its own run.

title: PM chat discovery produces a draft
description: A PM requirement-discovery chat should ask follow-up questions and produce a structured draft once enough context is gathered.

title: Active PM thread routes back to Product Director
description: An active PM discovery thread waiting on a human reply should prevent idle routing and send the flow back to Product Director.

title: Structural pending task routes to Architect
description: Pending implementation work linked to a structural requirement should route to Architect before Engineer.

title: Tutoring teaching stays grounded
description: Starting a learning session should produce a bounded concept teaching turn grounded in the selected concept and OS context.

title: Tutoring clarification is specific
description: A follow-up clarification should change based on the learner's exact confusion instead of returning the same generic answer.

title: Tutoring understanding check distinguishes weak and strong explanations
description: The learning session should route weak explanations into clarification and strong explanations into a stronger next move.

title: Tutoring progression and build routing are sensible
description: The tutoring agent should auto-promote low-risk concept states and route build-first concepts into build-to-learn after strong understanding.

title: Tutoring recommendations compound after progress
description: After meaningful learning progress, the next recommended concepts should change in a way that reflects relationships and recent progress.

title: Tutoring hierarchical comparison is explicit
description: When the learner asks for a nearby comparison with hierarchy, the tutoring response should name the broader/narrower relationship directly instead of giving only a vague distinction.
